articles.title: Can We All Stop Pretending That Solana Is in Beta?
articles.description: The phrase is only rolled out when things break on the popular blockchain.

articles.title: Ripple’s XRP Eying Fresh Trillion-Dollar Payments Market Amid Calls For Massive Adoption By Big U.S. Banks
articles.description: In a bold move, cross-border remittance giant Ripple is set to re-engage with the U.S. market following a partial victory against the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) mid-last year.

articles.title: Solana Price Rebounds as Network Restarts After Outage
articles.description: The Solana network was down almost five hours before a software patch brought it back online, marking the first major outage in nearly a year.

articles.title: Monero sell-off alert: Binance sets date to delist XMR
articles.description: On February 6, Binance announced the delisting of Monero (XMR) and three other cryptocurrencies from its services on February 20. … Continue reading The post Monero sell-off alert: Binance sets date to delist XMR appeared first on Finbold.

articles.title: SOL Price Dips below $94 after Solana Network Outage
articles.description: Coinspeaker SOL Price Dips below $94 after Solana Network Outage At the time of writing, the network was still down amidst a call for validators to install the new software batch before restarting the network. SOL Price Dips below $94 after Solana Network Outage

articles.title: Solana Suffers 11th Outage In 2 Years, SOL Price Drops 3%
articles.description: The Solana blockchain network is currently experiencing an outage, marking its 11th such incident in the past two years. As of the latest updates, Solana’s mainnet-beta has been non-operational for about two hours, with block progression coming to a standstill. Solana Network Comes To A Standstill The issue was first noticed when Solscan and OKLink, two prominent block explorers, indicated a...

articles.title: SOL Dips 4% Following Solana Network Outage
articles.description: The price of Solana's SOL token wavered after the network rolled out a software update to validators following a "major outage."

articles.title: Solana mainnet down almost a year after last major outage
articles.description: According to the network, this is the first major Solana mainnet outage since February last year when disruption lasted nearly 19 hours.

articles.title: Solana block production halts, validators confirm major outage
articles.description: The Solana blockchain experienced a major outage earlier today, February 6, which halted block production on the network. Engineers across the Solana ecosystem are investigating the cause of the outage on the blockchain's mainnet-beta.https://twitter.com/SolanaStatus/status/1754813351945789491The outage began around 10:22 UTC, according to status updates from validators and Solana's official...

articles.title: The Solana Network Goes Down
articles.description: Solana, the fifth biggest crypto with a market cap of $40 billion is currently experiencing a major outage in its live blockchain network.

articles.title: Solana is Down: SOL Price is Dipping
articles.description: Solana is down. Engineers are working to identify the issue.

articles.title: Solana blockchain is down; no blocks since 10:22 UTC
articles.description: The Solana network experienced an outage on Feb. 6, 10:22 UTC and engineers from across the ecosystem are investigating an outage on mainnet-beta.

articles.title: Solana Network Suffers Brief Outage, SOL Steady
articles.description: Solana Mainnet-Beta is experiencing a performance "degradatation," a validator said.
